content.text: Generic classes and interfaces carry one or more type parameters that are bound when the class is instantiated or the interface is implemented. This enables a single class body to be reused safely with any type the consumer provides — without any casting or code duplication.

attrs.alt: Generic interface Repository<T> implemented by UserRepository and ProductRepository with T bound to User and Product respectively

Static members of a generic class

) allow callers to omit the type argument when the default covers the common case.
Angular patterns: generic CRUD base service, generic signal store, and generic event bus are all built on this feature.
